title: [外國文宣請入] GreenLeft Weekly interview request

replies.msg:
Hi I am a Hong konger studying in the University of Sydney. A radical left newspaper in Australia, GreenLeft Weekly, would like to interview to learn about the current status of the Hong Kong protest

Past coverage on the Hong Kong protest:
https://www.greenleft.org.au/content/hong-kong-people-will-continue-fight
https://www.greenleft.org.au/content/joint-solidarity-statement-stop-police-brutality-hong-kong-no-extradition-china

If any of you are interested and ok about it, please contact us here: sydney@greenleft.org.au
Thank you for voicing out for Hongkongers!!!
